resources.string: Notify for Amazfit & Zepp from HUAWEI AppGallery!
Notify for Mi Band from HUAWEI AppGallery!
To make Garmin integration work properly, please uninstall the legacy Sleep Garmin add-on, this is now part the main app.
Start the SLEEP app on you IQConnect Garmin watch
TIZEN: Samsung Gear S, S2, S3, Gear Fit 2, Galaxy Watch 1,2,3 (watch app required)
IMPORTANT: check Galaxy Wear > Watch settings > Apps > Sleep tracking > Allow background activity [x]!!! Watch app required!
Backup your sleep data and then access it from other devices or your desktop. Share, compare, and analyze your sleep.
More CAPTCHA to get you out of bed on time.
61+ new lullabies for your smooth fall asleep.
Light stimulating sleep mask for sunrise-like alarm, lucid dreaming cues, and more.
Track your sleep and wake up gently with Mi Band or Amazfit
Track sleep with your wearables: PineTime, Wear OS, Galaxy/Gear (Tizen), Garmin (ConnectIQ), Mi Band + Amazfit + Zepp (+companion apps), Polar (H10, OH10, Sense), FitBit (Ionic, Sense, Versa)
Get a disposable home test for sleep apnea analyzed by medical professionals.
Wear OS, Galaxy, Garmin ConnectIQ, MiBand, Amazfit, Zepp, Polar (H10, OH10, Sense), PineTime, Pebble
You have changed next alarm time to %1$s.
We keep this app free by showing ads. Can we use your data to personalize ads? Learn more: team.urbandroid.org/privacy
Alcohol consumption decreases your quality of sleep
Drink less or no caffeine in the afternoon
Arrange a calm environment before sleep
Avoid eating at least 3 hours before bedtime
Avoid LCD screens before sleep to boost melatonin (use the Twilight app)
Expose yourself to light during the day and then keep your room dark before bedtime
Some sleeping aids may increase snoring
Nap to make up for lost sleep
Set a regular bedtime schedule with Bedtime notifications
Wake up on time with CAPTCHA
Inconsistent or missing data to form a model. Please try to select a different period, wait for more data, or delete some sleep records with wrong or extreme values.
Snoring may be a warning sign of more severe respiratory issues, such as sleep apnea
Consider visiting your doctor to test for respiratory issues during sleep
Get a home sleep apnea test analyzed by medical professionals.
In order to maximize %1$s your %2$s should ideally be at least %3$s
This may decrease your all cause mortality hazard.
This may increase your all cause mortality hazard.
Social jet lag shows how differently you sleep on your workdays and free days. Try to keep it low for healthier sleep.
Regularity is the key to healthy sleep.

Automatic airplane mode is not available on your device. We can only turn off WiFi. But you can do more with our app Dozzzer - it can disable data during your sleep and even save your battery during the days.
Blocks the power off dialog during an alarm.
Seems like you have cheated CAPTCHA recently.
Huh, you\'re the clever one who can cheat CAPTCHA?\n\nTry placing a small refundable deposit that is lost once you cheat.
Individual alarm settings can override some of the defaults below!
Time to gently increase alarm volume up to max level
Alarm volume will gradually increase to wake you gently with the least volume needed.
Backup alarm starts after the regular alarm timeout
Try out our new Alarm screen and Sound picker!
Disable screen orientation changes while the alarm rings
Use your phone\'s camera flashlight to wake you up with light.
Anonymous stats, better apps. Your privacy stays locked while the experience gets a tune-up.
Are you sure you want to opt-out of anonymous statistics gathering? The gathered data is completely anonymous and helps us to further improve the app.
Detects snoring and uses vibration or sound to make you stop
Use oximetry to see whether your body maintains healthy respiration and oxygen levels during sleep.
We have greatly improved awake detection with better success rate and detailed sensitivity options. Now it works with Sonar and SleepPhaser too!

We tried to wake you up, but Sleep as Android was background restricted. We may not have been able to start the alarm. Please ensure that the app is not background restricted for alarms to work properly. See dontkillmyapp.com.
App is blocked from running in the background
Disable `Background restrictions` in `Settings - Apps - Sleep - Battery` or check dontkillmyapp.com for your manufacturer.
The system detected battery overheating. You can help us analyze the problem by clicking on OK and sending an error re;rt with more details.
Get to bed now to keep at your sleep duration goal.
Get notified of bedtime even when no alarms are scheduled
This feature is only available in the latest BETA version. BETA means more features but a higher chance of bugs. Start receiving BETA versions from the Play Store?
Dear BETA Tester, we\'re going to reset the BETA group on Friday Dec 13. Please tap to read more.
Please report any issues using Menu - Support - Report a bug. For discussion, please use https://forum.urbandroid.org.
Welcome to Sleep as Android BETA
Stimulates your mind for waking up faster
Relax your mind for falling asleep faster.
Device with HR over BT Smart (e.g. Polar H8…)
Reschedule alarm based on actual calendar events
Notify about repeating alarms on public holidays
Please start tracking from the watch - Garmin Vívoactive 3 has a firmware bug that breaks starting from phone. Tap to see more information.
Sorry, we cannot record sound without you granting microphone permission!
Start you brain with a memory test
Try out our new redesigned CAPTCHA!
Ready to scan. Place your phone over the NFC tag.
Place the NFC tag somewhere far from your bed - ideally in another room.
Click learn and place your phone over the NFC tag.
On the next morning, you will need to get out of bed to stop the alarm.
Force stop and uninstall protection by making the app a device admin. Uncheck to revoke.
CAPTCHA Cheating protection is not compatible with NFC CAPTCHA when screen is locked!
Prove that you are fully awake by solving a little task to stop the alarm
Test your CAPTCHA upfront to avoid surprises in the morning.
Print a QR code or reuse any barcode
Stick the code on your bathroom mirror, for example
Click learn and point your phone at the code.
On the next morning, you can only stop the alarm by getting out of the bed and scanning the code.
Dropbox, Google Drive, Google Fit, Samsung Health, IFTTT, Spotify, Automation…
If you are using odd / even week alarms, they may have got reversed due to a bug, please double check your alarm schedules. Sorry for the issues.
Your sleep quality at a glance
Are you a morning lark or night owl? Find out!
Unlimited with subscription, once per week with Lifetime
Cloud backup quota exceeded. Please install SleepCloud to keep your sleep data safe in the cloud.
Upload to SleepCloud is limited once per week. Please consider upgrading to SleepCloud premium.
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
You\'re in control - choose what info you want to share with apps.
Google Play services must be enabled for %1$s.
Install Google Play services to continue using %1$s.
%1$s couldn\'t connect to Google Play services. Please sign-in to your Google account.
%1$s couldn\'t connect to Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s can\'t run because your device doesn\'t support Google Play services. Please use a supported device.
Update Google Play services to use %1$s.
%1$s will be available once the Google Play services update is complete.
Update Google Play services to use %1$s.
Sorry, %s requires at least Android version %s.
Sorry, the required sensor is not available.
Balance (1,2), GTR (3, Pro, 4, Mini), GTS (3,4), T-Rex (2,3, Pro, Ultra), Active (Max, 2, Edge), Bip (5,6), Cheetah (Pro), Falcon (watch app required)
We are using the device ID for analytics and ads
Hue cannot find your bridge. Please check that it is connected to the same Wi-Fi router as your app and press
Pin most useful cards to the top.
Keep dashboard clean! Swipe irrelevant cards away or use Hide / Show below.
Dashboard is now here for everyone! We\'ve switched the main page to use Dashboard by default - try it out! You can go back to Tabs anytime using Settings -> Personalize -> Home screen -> Tabs.
We process personal data in the bug report for legitimate interests to improve our services and provide customer support.\nLearn more: https://team.urbandroid.org/privacy.
Sleep that ends after this hour will be considered part of the next day
Start tracking after a typical fall asleep delay
Without the permission to record and store audio, we won\'t be able to record your sleep noises or detect your snoring.
Do you want to import your sleep records from %1$s ?
This sleep record overlaps with another
Dimming: slide or back to undim
Do you want to disable automatic update checks?
What can we do for you?
There is already a record with the same start time
Won\'t wake up before reaching my sleep duration goal or the alarm time (CAUTION: smart wake up may not work)
In order to edit data, you need to switch to a new data format. You can do so on application startup.
Sorry, there was an issue when you last used the app. Please help us fix this problem by sending us the attached error report.
Sorry, the application has crashed unexpectedly. Please help us fix the problem promptly by sending the attached error report.
Please help us improve the application by sending the attached error report.
Sorry, last time you used the application, it froze or crashed. Please help fix the problem promptly by sending the attached error report.
Please allow us to schedule alarms, otherwise we won\'t wake you up on time.
Showing ads in %1$d day(s). Unlock the premium features and stop ads.
Remove ads and unlock the premium features
Went to bed and does not want to be disturbed!
Improve your sleep with clean air by building our powerful and ultra-affordable DIY air cleaner.
Helps your baby fall asleep instantly using womb-emulating sounds.
The ultimate habit tracker and reminder for muggles.
Disconnect from your phone, focus, and live real life.
Make apps work! Benchmark your phone and see if it is killing and breaking apps.
Focus on your life not your phone! Just flip your phone screen down and get no more distractions.
Eye-candy dock to instantly switch between tasks.
Saving battery. Android Marshmallow\'s Doze mode for all Androids.
Personalized fitness plans to achieve your goal at home
Makes Philips HUE and IKEA Trådfri bulbs dynamic. Start a party or relax in front of a fireplace right in your living room.
24 status bar indicators: battery, CPU, signal, data…
Puts your inner ear in sync with your eyes for pleasant reading or watching videos while travelling without Kinetosis
See how sleep, exercise and nutrition habits add years to your life expectancy.
Faster fall asleep with a guided meditation or breath exercises
jízdní řády MHD v ČR. Nehledá jen cestu mezi zastávkami, ale umí najít např. aktuálně nejrychlejší trasu z prace domů…
Mindmachine on Phone: Relax, Focus, or Sleep.
Discover & monitor your functional age and get an individualized physical activity plan to slow down, or even reverse your aging.
Manage your Pokemon TCG card collection: Scan, Trade, Valuate!
nejbližší čerpací stanice s nejnižšími a aktuálními cenami paliv…
Make your phone read you a bedtime story.
Get 50% OFF our friend app Sleep as Android and start improving sleep today
Brings Merge apps & tabs back to Chrome, see your browser history within your recent tasks where it belongs.
Adapts your screen to the sun cycle. Reduces eye strain. Healthy melatonin production for better sleep.
Make kids headphones from any headphones, limit volume for Kids\' safe hearing
4-hour weather forecast in an analog watchface.
Please let us know how you like the redesign of this screen.
Please let us know how you like the new Lullaby screen.
Just few more minutes. Personalize the app to suit your needs for your perfect sleep.
Waiting for Fitbit - not consuming any battery
To maximize sleep improvement we recommend unlocking the full experience with Premium.
This app is FREE to use!
Please allow personalized ads and analytics
Change your sleep duration goal and get notified of bedtime
Improve your sleep with new Goals!
Sorry, cannot refund your motivation deposit.

To increase motivation, we ask for a little deposit that is refundable as soon as you reach your goal within its schedule.

You can also cancel your goal for free any time within the first week.

Should you miss your goal afterward, we keep the deposit and use it for improving the app and conducting further sleep research (see SleepCloud study).
Select one aspect of your sleep to improve over a period of one month. Build a solid and lasting effect. Set motivation and track progress.
Time to get up ahead of the event
Sleep as Android integrates with Google Fit.\nYour sleep records will be stored in Google Fit and available through the official app.
When will vibrations start during gentle volume
Terminating sleep tracking. Would you like to save your current sleep graph?
Sleep as Android integrates with Health Connect.\nYour sleep records will be stored in Health Connect and available through the official app.
Health Connect API not available or requires an update
In order to sync sleep data between Sleep as Android and Health Connect, the app needs read and write permissions for sleep data in Health Connect.
Smile as much as you can!
The increase of heart rate variability overnight shows how effectively can your sleep rest your body.
Please let us know how we can improve.
App update failed, please try again on the next app launch.
Please install Watch/Phaser Starter for Sleep as Android to start tracking from the watch.
Please install Sleep on your Garmin watch
There isn\'t a second app with the same level of integration
Select your travel destination\'s timezone and get your body adjusted ahead of time.
Each hour difference requires one extra day to adjust. This makes a week when going from San Francisco to London.
Based on Stanford jet lag research, we use short regular light flashes to reprogram your body.
Point your phone\'s flashlight at the ceiling (or even better at your eyes) and keep your room as dark as possible.
For better results use the Sleep Mask, IKEA Trådfri, or Philips HUE smart bulbs.
Android 4.4 does not allow writing to external SD card

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nam in scelerisque sem. Mauris volutpat, dolor id interdum ullamcorper, risus dolor egestas lectus, sit amet mattis purus dui nec risus. Maecenas non sodales nisi, vel dictum dolor. Class aptent taciti sociosqu ad litora torquent per conubia nostra, per inceptos himenaeos. Suspendisse blandit eleifend diam, vel rutrum tellus vulputate quis. Aliquam eget libero aliquet, imperdiet nisl a, ornare ex. Sed rhoncus est ut libero porta lobortis. Fusce in dictum tellus.

 Suspendisse interdum ornare ante. Aliquam nec cursus lorem. Morbi id magna felis. Vivamus egestas, est a condimentum egestas, turpis nisl iaculis ipsum, in dictum tellus dolor sed neque. Morbi tellus erat, dapibus ut sem a, iaculis tincidunt dui. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante ipsum primis in faucibus. Curabitur et eros porttitor, ultricies urna vitae, molestie nibh. Phasellus at commodo eros, non aliquet metus. Sed maximus nisl nec dolor bibendum, vel congue leo egestas.

 Sed interdum tortor nibh, in sagittis risus mollis quis. Curabitur mi odio, condimentum sit amet auctor at, mollis non turpis. Nullam pretium libero vestibulum, finibus orci vel, molestie quam. Fusce blandit tincidunt nulla, quis sollicitudin libero facilisis et. Integer interdum nunc ligula, et fermentum metus hendrerit id. Vestibulum lectus felis, dictum at lacinia sit amet, tristique id quam. Cras eu consequat dui. Suspendisse sodales nunc ligula, in lobortis sem porta sed. Integer id ultrices magna, in luctus elit. Sed a pellentesque est.

 Aenean nunc velit, lacinia sed dolor sed, ultrices viverra nulla. Etiam a venenatis nibh. Morbi laoreet, tortor sed facilisis varius, nibh orci rhoncus nulla, id elementum leo dui non lorem. Nam mollis ipsum quis auctor varius. Quisque elementum eu libero sed commodo. In eros nisl, imperdiet vel imperdiet et, scelerisque a mauris. Pellentesque varius ex nunc, quis imperdiet eros placerat ac. Duis finibus orci et est auctor tincidunt. Sed non viverra ipsum. Nunc quis augue egestas, cursus lorem at, molestie sem. Morbi a consectetur ipsum, a placerat diam. Etiam vulputate dignissim convallis. Integer faucibus mauris sit amet finibus convallis.

 Phasellus in aliquet mi. Pellentesque habitant morbi tristique senectus et netus et malesuada fames ac turpis egestas. In volutpat arcu ut felis sagittis, in finibus massa gravida. Pellentesque id tellus orci. Integer dictum, lorem sed efficitur ullamcorper, libero justo consectetur ipsum, in mollis nisl ex sed nisl. Donec maximus ullamcorper sodales. Praesent bibendum rhoncus tellus nec feugiat. In a ornare nulla. Donec rhoncus libero vel nunc consequat, quis tincidunt nisl eleifend. Cras bibendum enim a justo luctus vestibulum. Fusce dictum libero quis erat maximus, vitae volutpat diam dignissim.
Perform a light pattern on your lucid dreaming mask when in deep sleep
Try out our new redesigned Lullabies!
Play last used lullabies in order
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Use Search and Help (?) to better find and understand settings.

Smart alarm clock with sleep cycle tracking. Wakes you gently in the optimal moment for pleasant a morning. Sleep as Android is a swissknife tool for your sleep. Features: • Sleep cycle tracking with a smart wake up uses your phone or any of the many supported wearables (2 weeks premium trial, with a freemium mode afterward) • Sonar: revolutionary contactless ultrasonic sleep tracking (no need for keeping your phone in bed) • Wearable tracking supports: Wear OS, Galaxy/Gear (Tizen), Garmin (ConnectIQ), Mi Band + Amazfit (via companion apps), Polar (H10, OH10, Sense), FitBit (Ionic, Sense, Versa), Pebble • Sleep Score: complete evaluation of your sleep quality: deficit, regularity, efficiency, sleep phases, snoring, oxygenation (SPO2), and heart rate variability (HRV) • Advanced AI-powered sound classification: Sleep talk recording, sickness detection, snoring detection, and anti-snoring • Sleep respiration analysis with a low breath rate alarm • Super reliable and super configurable alarms (check your OEM at https://dontkillmyapp.com) • Trend charts, Goals for gradual improvement of your sleep and detailed advice on your sleep habits • Bedtime reminder and irregularity tracking helps you keep regular sleep schedule (regular means healthy) • Never oversleep again with CAPTCHA wake up verification (Math, Sheep counting, Phone shaking, Bathroom QR code or NFC tag) • Health services sync: Google Fit, Samsung Health • Gentle volume increase with nature sound alarms (birds, sea, storm...) and playlists • Nature sound lullabies (whales, storm, sea, chants...) with binaural tones for falling asleep fast • Spotify and online radio alarms and lullabies • Sunrise wake-up with smart bulbs: Philips HUE, IKEA TRÅDFRI • Complete automation with IFTTT, MQTT, Tasker, or custom Webhooks • Lucid dreaming: experiment with your sleep and consciousness • Jet lag prevention for frequent travelers • Lark or Owl?: Chronotype detection • Focus on privacy and more Quick start https://docs.sleep.urbandroid.org/faqs/quick_start.html Video tutorial https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6HHYxnvIPA0 Documentation https://docs.sleep.urbandroid.org/ FAQ https://docs.sleep.urbandroid.org/faqs/ Permissions explained https://docs.sleep.urbandroid.org/general/permissions.html See how we perform contactless sleep and breath tracking with Sonar https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cjXExBj6VcY How we designed our neural networks for sleep sound classification https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OVeT0KIXp2k Watch our latest smartwatch integration progress https://docs.sleep.urbandroid.org/devices/wearables.html This app uses the Device Administrator permission. The reason is effective CAPTCHA (a feature to make sure you wake up in the morning) so that you cannot avoid alarms by uninstalling the app during an alarm. Many thanks to our users for using and supporting this app!
Sleep as Android helped me improve my sleep, now I wake up gently with nature sounds in the optimal phase

We are constantly improving this app with several updates monthly. Bringing timely fixes and new features you ask for. Detailed release notes can be found at https://sleep.urbandroid.org/documentation/release-notes
Unlocks Sleep as Android premium so you can enjoy sleep tracking every day without limits. Install this Unlock on top of the free app to keep all the settings and data.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Minimum playback time. Afterward volume starts decreasing gently (including external players) if you are already sleeping
Copy favourite recordings to an album in device\'s local media store
Add guided fall asleep meditation to your lullaby
Oops, this feature is not yet available in this version.
Failed to migrate data due to technical problems. Will keep the old data format.
Data migration is in progress. Please, wait.
Migration of data succeeded. From now on, the new data format will be used.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
new CAPTCHA for your smooth wake up

There is a new data format available, do you want to migrate to that format? With a new data format you can alter your ratings and comments after the sleep record is stored. Migration is strongly recommended.
Try out the new, smoother Spotify integration. Tap to enable
You can start your coffee machine with 5 different services and 27 selectable events. Now with MQTT and custom webhooks.
Color Sleep as Android your way…
Check how other people sleep around the world…
It seems that you have NFC disabled. Please enable it before using this feature.
It seems that your phone does not support NFC tag scanning. Please, use a different type of CAPTCHA
Upgrade to Premium to remove ads
Everything\'s like clockwork here.\nCheck back later!
Cannot set airplane mode, please do it manually instead.
No card, no payment, no strings attached
We can do more to prevent CAPTCHA cheating!
In order to be able to use this feature, please grant the app the \'%1$s\' permission.
In order to be able to use \'%1$s\', please grant the app the \'%2$s\' permission.
No sleep records for the selected period
Time before alarm to find optimal wake up moment based on your sleep phases
Search your feelings!\nYou know the keyword.
You may have missed an alarm due to the app being restricted to work in the background. To prevent this, follow the guide at dontkillmyapp.com
The app is restricted to work in background
Allow app to send you notifications?
Thanks for your interest.\nWe will share more once you\'re back online.
You are back online! Let\'s pick up where we left off
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
We\'ll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site.
Open ad when you\'re back online.
Forces screen off tracking even for a device that is detected as not capable of screen off tracking. May block sleep tracking!
Are you sure? On most devices, this will cause distorted or empty sleep graphs and a broken smart wake up. Enable force screen off only if you know what you are doing!
Please describe your problem below and provide detailed steps regarding how to reproduce it.
Please allow fullscreen alarm in the morning by granting permission to draw over other apps.
CAPTCHA cheating protection requires permission to draw over other apps.
Starting sleep tracking automatically or from wearables (on Android 11+) requires permission to draw over other apps (well this is Android).
Sleeping close together? Pair tracking will filter partner\'s movement from your data.
Please allow the app change your DND state and volume during sleep tracking.
Get $10 OFF on the Philips Hue White Ambiance starter kit (or $15 when you Unlock Sleep as Android)
Get $15 OFF on the Philips Hue White Ambiance starter kit
Suppress alarms, lullabies, and noise recording in phone calls.
May take more than one minute

To make sure you won\'t sleep through your duties the app uses an Accessibility Service to prevent you from force stopping the app or turning off the device (cheating) before completing the alarm tasks (CAPTCHA). No private information are collected. For full cheating protection, please enable the app\'s Accessibility Service on the next screen
Alarm rings at optimal sleep phase up to 1 hour later AFTER your alarm time!
Alarm rings at optimal sleep phase up to 1 hour later AFTER your alarm time!
Sleep Better by Unlocking the Full Experience

Sleep as Android + Google Fit integration is used for:
 1) exporting sleep data to Google Fit as sleep activities including sleep stages and HR data
 2) reading data from the user’s Google Fit account produced by Sleep as Android
 3) if sleep sessions ar modified or removed within the Sleep as Android app, such changes will get written to Google Fit
 
 All the data are stored only either offline in the app or in Google Fit. The only exception when the data can leave the phone are various data backup option including the Android Backup mechanism or the Sleep Cloud service.
 
 How it is used by us: We use Google Fit as an alternative storage for the sleep data generated by the Sleep as Android app.
 
 Third parties involved: Google Inc. provides Google Fit.
 
 Urbandroid accesses Fit via the Fit API, using the following scopes:
 DataType.TYPE_SLEEP_SEGMENT – READ / WRITE
 DataType.TYPE_ACTIVITY_SEGMENT – WRITE (needed to be able to delete Sleep as Android records when deleted by the user)
 DataType.TYPE_HEART_RATE_BPM – READ / WRITE
 
 How to modify or delete the information: To delete the data, all records must be first deleted from Sleep as Android and next Google Fit sync action must be executed. User can also manage the data in their Google Account at the Google Account Dashboard.
 
 How to opt-out from future personal data collection: To stop uploading data to Google Fit and using data from the user’s Google Fit, disconnect Google Fit in the Sleep as Android app using Settings > Services > Google Fit.
 
 Data retention: We do not retain any data, all retained data are either offline in the app or in Google Fit, subject to Google’s privacy policy.
Philip Hue wakes you up naturally with simulated sunrise
Connect to HUE and get your trial period extended
Please, rate us in the Play Store
Are you sure you want to delete this?
Warning, this may affect sonar and snoring detection
Restoring settings from backup will override your current settings and change the apps behavior.
You can change your mind later in Settings - Personalize - Privacy.
Just watch one ad to extend your trial period by %1$d more day(s).
Sorry, cannot extend your trial right now, please try again later.
Just watch an ad and get your trial period extended.
This feature is not available on rooted devices
Sleep tracking with Garmin. Tap to stop.
Sleep tracking with Garmin using server. Tap to stop.
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Sleep as Android integrates with Samsung Health.\nYour sleep records will be stored in S Health and available through the official app.
Searching. Please be patient, it may take a while.
May interfere with bedtime modes and only works when sound recording is off
CAUTION: Don\'t use binaural beats if you suffer from epileptic or cardiac issues! Headphones needed.
Lucid dreaming is a technique to gain control over your dreams
Lullabies help you fall asleep faster
Wake up at the optimal sleep phase for a pleasant morning
Great for falling asleep with online radios or streaming services, e.g. Spotify or online radios
Setup Garmin with Sleep as Android
Sharing failed. Please try to reconnect in the Sharing settings.
Makes sure you wake up. Backup alarm plays at maximum volume after your regular alarm timeout.
The tutorial helps you set up key features and permissions correctly. Skip it only if you already know the app well.
Really want to skip the tutorial?
Tell me about trends in my sleep
How do I sleep compared to others
Sleep Assistant is only in Premium
Learn about your sleep from an AI Sleep assistant
Read sleep data from Sleep as Android
Write sleep data to Sleep as Android
During sleep, the body undergoes repair, memory consolidation, and emotional processing vital for physical and mental health and good cognitive function.
Sleep quality is the cornerstone of your health
See how Sleep as Android compares to the sleep lab
Sleep sound recognition, recording and anti-snoring
Powerful and smart nightlight with contactless sleep tracking and gentle sunrise wake up.
Sleep times are estimated based on your phone activity and ambient light (battery efficient) even when sleep tracking is not running.
Swiss knife tool for your sleep
Nothing smart here, alarm will wake you at exact alarm time.
Alarm starts at optimal sleep phase for a natural wake up.
Track your sleep with the wearable you already have
Press the link button on the bridge
PineTime, Wear OS, Garmin, Samsung Gear / Galaxy, Mi Band, Amazfit / Zepp, Pebble
Wear OS, Samsung Galaxy, Garmin IQ Connect, Mi Band / Amazfit / Zepp, Pebble, Polar, PineTime
Halve the snooze time after each snooze
Allow snooze duration change at alarm time
Allow to choose the snooze duration in alarm
Would you like to share this recording to help us improve our sound recognition?
Did we incorrectly recognize sounds in this recording? Please share it and we will improve it next time.
If you hear any disturbing audible artifacts, try lower Sonar volume or change frequency (F18-22) below.
Revolutionary contactless sleep tracking. Measures movement and breath rate using an ultrasonic signal reflected from your body.
Do not use Sonar with any kind of headphones!
Sorry, Sonar won\'t work on your device as it seems to be blocking ultrasonic output.
But wait, don\'t give up on contactless sleep tracking yet. Try SleepPhaser
With the right setup and device, sonar can even detect your breath rate and tell you about your potential respiratory issues.
Decrease sound recognition sensitivity by suppressing weak sounds
Connect your Spotify account and enjoy your favourite music in lullabies and alarms
Alarm will wake you between %1$s and %2$s in optimal phase.
Alarm will wake you between %1$s and %2$s in optimal phase.
Improve battery life during sleep tracking?
Lie down in your bed and place your phone on the mattress near your body
Better charge your phone to prevent discharge before the alarm
Already in DND, won\'t turn off
No permission to write noise recordings to your storage
Tracking has stopped due to a low battery. Please charge your device.
There are missing data in your sleep record. Please, make sure you do not leave the tracking screen or press the phone\'s power button.
Alarms and tracking may not fully work on your device, see dontkillmyapp.com on how to fix it
Audio recording failed. Maybe another app is using the microphone or cannot write to your storage.
Sensor is OFF, and so the sleep graph will contain no data
Lie down in bed and place the phone on your bedside table within 1m from your body.
Do not use headphones with Sonar! Check that the media volume is set to max, disable DND ALL, and prevent other apps from using the mic.
Sonar will keep your music or lullaby volume up!
Sony\'s STAMINA battery save mode blocks the alarms. Please disable it or whitelist this app.
Premium trial expired: Sleep phase tracking won\'t work today and every second day. Please consider Unlocking
Automatically charged after the free period
Alarm dismiss will end current sleep tracking

Thank you very much for using Sleep as Android (the App).

You understand and agree that the provider of this App will treat your use of the App as acceptance of this Terms of Use (the Terms) from that point onward.

The provider provides this App AS IS without any guarantees on its functionality, availability or correctness of the provided and stored data. Although the intent of the provider is to continuously improve the App and make it as good as possible. Moreover you acknowledge and agree that the provider of this App is not liable for any loss or damage caused to you by the use of the App including any loss or damage on your belongings, any injuries or health damage or any other liability whatsoever suffered as a result of your use of the App. Especially note that the provider of this App strongly recommends to use your device's Airplane mode during the whole period of sleep tracking.

The provider provides this App for you to track, manage, and share your sleep and lifestyle data. This app does not contain or constitute, and should not be interpreted as, medical advice or opinion. We are not licensed medical professionals, and we are not in the business of providing medical advice. You should always consult a qualified and licensed medical professional prior to beginning or modifying your sleep or lifestyle habits. Your use of this App does not create a doctor-patient relationship between you and the provider.

You acknowledge that the provider of this App reserves the right to change this Terms any time later on with a written notice.
Preview sleep tracking now to see how it will look at bedtime. Stop it anytime.
Allow Sleep as Android: Garmin addon to show you status and warning notifications to help you maintain maximum reliability for sleep tracking using your watch.
Turn off battery optimizations to allow sleep tracking sleep in the background. Tap on \"Fix\", then on \"App battery usage\" and set to \"Unrestricted\".
Say my alarm time, bedtime, and more
Accounts for smart wake up period, delayed tracking, and your average sleep deficit
Tap to stop tracking and save battery
Slide up to stop tracking after wake up
Please select a bridge to use for this app
This version is unofficial and may not work properly
This feature is not available on app versions not downloaded from the Play Store
In the menu drawer of the Play Store app, check that you have the same account that you purchased the app with.
Search for the app in Play Store and tap Download
To make in-apps work, Sleep as Android needs to be installed using the same account it was purchased with.
Choose My apps & games from the menu
Look for Sleep as Android and tap the cross icon to delete it from the library
Caution: Don\'t forget to backup all your data first!
Try to install the app from a PC browser, under the account you purchased it with
Please purchase Sleep as Android Unlock to access the premium features and help us further improve this app.
Thank you very much for your support. We will use your contributions to further improve the app.
Turn off battery optimizations needed. Tap here, then on \"App battery usage\" and set to \"Unrestricted\".
There is a new version on the market.
Use wall-clock-time for sleep regularity calculation
We love our users and our users love the app
Check out the new Sleep as Android video
Wake up time is %1$s, would you like to start sleep tracking?
No alarm scheduled, would you like to start sleep tracking?
No alarm scheduled, what\'s your wake up time?
Would you like to dismiss your %1$s alarm?
Puts your phone on standby when low on battery to save the power for the alarm (sleep tracking and smart wake up won\'t work in standby)
Double-check you\'re awake after alarm dismiss
A wake up check notification will show after you dismiss your alarm. If not confirmed alarm will start ringing again.
Wake up check notification is disabled!
Respiratory analysis error. Please repeat the measurement.
Location service needs to be enabled on your phone to be able to scan for nearby Bluetooth devices. Sounds strange? Yes, this is Android.
We won\'t be able to scan and connect to your BT device without this permission.
Mi Band 8 (Pro), Xiaomi Watch S1, Mi Band 7 Pro, Redmi Band 2, Redmi Watch 2+3
Polar 360, Vantage V3, Pacer, Pacer Pro, Ignite 3, Grit X2 Pro, Verity Sense, H10, OH1
Install Sleep as Android using Play Store also on your watch
Want to get rid of bad habits?
What would you like to improve?
Track your sleep deficit, regularity, efficiency, sleep phases, snoring, oxygenation, heart rate variability and more
Make sure to whitelist Garmin Connect Mobile from any battery optimization.
Check how you slept last night
